question.label: Delegation boundary
question.name: What work are you still holding that someone else could own?
question.description: Tests delegation boundaries and whether senior-level work is being distributed well.

answer: I want to focus first on unblocking the one dependency that is slowing the team the most this week.

assessment.note: She pivots from delegation to a concrete priority — unblocking one dependency — which shows current focus but only weak signal that she is offloading work.

history.answer_excerpt: I am proud of the outcomes, but the pace should not be normal.
I still do not get enough substantive feedback on key decisions.
I want clearer ownership boundaries so I am not default escalation.
If we reset scope now, the next month is sustainable.
The last stretch shipped, but it was heavier than I made it sound.
Late nights came from carrying decision bottlenecks and final reviews.
Some of that work could have moved to the team sooner.

Next I want to hand off one stream end-to-end and stay out of the middle.
